chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-4664 of 2025 Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1.For orders on office objection. 2.For hearing of Main Case. 3.For orders on Misc. No.9641/2026 21st April, 2026. Mr. Ahsanullah Advocate a/w petitioner Ms. Shazia Hanjrah, DAG M/s Hakim Ali Shaikh, Addl.A.G.Sindh & Sagheer Ahmed Abbasi, A.A.G.Sindh Mr. Faheem Hussain Panhwar, D.P.G.Sindh. Mr. Sajjad Ali Law Officer Pakistan Rangers. DSP Abid Fazal, SDPO Malir Karachi >>>>> <<<<< DSP Abid Fazal SDPO Malir Karachi files progress report/statement dated 21.04.2026 along with certain documents in respect of constitution of JIT, which are taken on the record. Learned counsel for the petitioner draws the attention of court towards CMA No.9641/2026, an application for withdrawal of petition, and submits that petitioner does not wish to press this petition. The petitioner who is also present in court, affirms the above submission of learned counsel representing him vis-à-vis contents of withdrawal application. Learned Deputy Attorney General for Pakistan, Addl.A.G.Sindh, A.A.G.Sindh and D.P.G.Sindh have no objection to the grant of withdrawal application. Accordingly, CMA No.9641/2026 is allowed. Resultantly, the petition is hereby dismissed as withdrawn along with pending applications. Judge Head of Const. Benches Aamir/PS Judge
